article.title: Uber LLD rounds
article.content:
I have a LLD round in Uber Hyderabad Staff L5B role.  How should I prepare? I've been told it's on hackerrank. I am not able to find playground for practice where multiple files of code can exist. How can I practice it?


Also, if anyone can give sample problems especially for LLD round, I'll appreciate it.


YOE: 15
TC: 1.6 CR

post.content: For LLD on Hackerrank, check out the codepair feature that lets you handle multiple files. If you want to practice design scenarios specifically for Uber, PracHub has a set that matches what recruiters usually focus on. It's better than scrolling through a bunch of random blog posts trying to find the right info.

not sure whether L5B has separate requirements, but for L4 i can say, u just need to code everything (classes, interfaces, enums) in a single file as HackerRank just supports that. Also, for L4, LLD is just a wrapper over some DSA prblm, and u r mainly evaluated based on the DSA only (most of the times). Again this is for L4, not sure of L5B. You will get lots of LLD prblms for L4 and L5A in Leetcode and Reddit discussions.
